[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline BU F1TENTH AUTONOMOUS GRAND Prix

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
September 11th |  Registration Opens  
October 25th  
12pm ET  
8pm GST | Orientation (on Zoom)  
[Meeting Link](https://bostonu.zoom.us/j/96149848765) [Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vSM2zat7Wg3B-Z2ANV4ILFpD-443i-HjCc72UjeGmrKDSMPT020eW7pNFyYbsYhvg/pub?start=false&loop=false&delayms=30000)  
Competition overview, participants can ask questions  
November 15th | Last day to register if there are still spots available  
9 am - 2 pm ET, November 22nd | Open Training  
2 pm - 4:30 pm ET, November 22nd | Time Trials and Head-to-Head Race  
4:30 pm - 6:00 pm ET, November 22nd | Award Ceremony and Reception
